text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Japan Cup. Kitasan Black is joining this
massive carnival while shouldering the whole of
Japan like it's an enormous portable shrine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Past winners come up to Kitasan Black to give her
pointers on how to handle the pressure of the
race.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Listen, Kitasan. You have to keep your guard up.
Otherwise, the speed demons of the world will
sprint off and leave you in the dust!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Got it, Vodka! I'll stick right to my opponents, no
matter how hard they try to shake me off!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Since people call me the Ruler of Japan, and
you're known as the clutch captain, I hope you'll
do your best as Japan's clutchest captain!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I will! It's an honor to be regarded as your equal!
I'll do my best to carry out my given role!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Do your best, Kita. You have to win this, just like
I did because of how much I admired Prez.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I want to be like you too! I might not
be able to run in as cool a manner as you, but I'll
do it in my own way.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... There's so much riding on my
shoulders... I knew that going in, but still...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I mean, I can't embarrass myself in front of
the whole world, and I've got to shoulder this
weight all the way to the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black has made it through some tight
spots before, but it seems bearing her country's
banner is weighing heavily on her.
choice_data_list:
Why don't we head out to the paddock for
now?

Why don't we head out to the paddock for
now?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
S-sure! Sounds good. We can't just stand around
like this. To the paddock!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But despite her apprehension, I know she'll be
fine, no matter how heavy the burden she carries
is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Go, Kitasan! We're right here with you!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Your cheering squad, reporting for duty! Today,
we fight together!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Kiiitasan! KIIITASAN!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Whoa... Trainer... look...
choice_data_list: Everyone came to help you carry this weight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The cheers keep coming. That's right. A great
deal of people saw her run at the autumn Tenno
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her performance there dazzled many into
becoming fans, and now, they've surged forward
to help shoulder the weight of representing
Japan.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
That's right. The very people I want to make smile
are here for me.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oooh yeah! I've got to be front and center to
hype up the crowd! This festival belongs to us!
